CustomField.formula: IF (Now() - CreatedDate > 0, TEXT(FLOOR(Now() - CreatedDate)) & " days " & TEXT( FLOOR( 24 * (Now() - CreatedDate - FLOOR(Now() - CreatedDate) ))) & " hours " & TEXT( ROUND(60 * (ROUND( 24 * (Now() - CreatedDate - FLOOR(Now() - CreatedDate) ),8) - FLOOR( ROUND( 24 * (Now() - CreatedDate - FLOOR(Now() - CreatedDate) ),8)) ),0)) & " min ago" , "")
CustomField.label: Time Sent
